name: podcast-monitor
description: Daily podcast monitoring agent for Hamid. Reads a Notion-maintained list of podcasts, fetches transcripts from YouTube, summarizes new episodes against a personal interest profile, and delivers to Notion + Slack + email.

rubric.name: notion_delivery_succeeded
rubric.description: A new page was created in the Daily Briefings database for today's date with all expected child blocks.

rubric.name: slack_delivery_succeeded
rubric.description: A Slack message was posted to the configured channel containing a link to today's Notion briefing.

rubric.name: email_delivery_succeeded
rubric.description: An email containing today's briefing was sent to the configured address.

rubric.name: all_active_podcasts_checked
rubric.description: Every podcast row with Active=true in the Notion Podcasts database was checked for new episodes.

rubric.name: no_duplicate_episodes
rubric.description: No episode that already appears in seen_episodes.json was reprocessed.

rubric.name: interest_profile_applied
rubric.description: Each episode summary references at least one theme, person, or company from the interest profile, OR explicitly notes 'not aligned with profile, surfacing because [reason]'.

rubric.name: transcripts_or_explicit_fallback
rubric.description: For each new episode, either a transcript was successfully fetched OR the episode was marked pending_youtube with a clear reason in the briefing.
